title: Hidden medieval passage discovered inside ancient neolithic monument
description: A mysterious medieval tunnel hidden inside a Neolithic tomb dating back more than 5,000 years has been discovered in Germany.

title: Embryo fossil found in South Africa is world's oldest proof that mammal ancestors laid eggs - Phys.org
description: Embryo fossil found in South Africa is world's oldest proof that mammal ancestors laid eggs Phys.org Embryo fossil found in South Africa is world’s oldest proof that mammal ancestors laid eggs The Conversation 250-Million-Year-Old Embryonated Dicynodont Egg Found in South Africa Sci.News Mammal ancestors laid eggs—and this 250-million-year-old fossil proves it Phys.org

title: Embryo fossil found in South Africa is world's oldest proof that mammal ancestors laid eggs
description: Between 280 and 200 million years ago, a group of animals evolved which would eventually give rise to mammals, including humans: the therapsids. They were first described more than 150 years ago, based on fossils from South Africa. Since then, many more fossils have been discovered.

title: Ancient town remains intact underwater in southeastern Turkey
description: A 2,400-year-old historical landscape featuring tombs, temples, and intact ruins has been discovered beneath a dam in Turkey.

title: Amid West Asia crisis: Santa Marta meet aims to drive fossil fuel shift
description: The Santa Marta conference has been described as a meeting of the coalition of doers , comprising countries and stakeholders committed to shifting away from fossil fuels. It will bring together members of existing alliances such as the Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty, the Beyond Oil and Gas Alliance, and the Powering Past Coal Alliance.
